[[Baron/Legends|Baron]] '''Galrowk''' was a [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] businessbeing based on [[Gambolla]].

In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], the [[Tanda Marelle|Tombat]] bested his estate's security system and stole Baron Galrowk's famed art collection.
